summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration; import java.util.Collections; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.Map; import java.util.Set; public class FileChangeTracker { public enum ChangeType { NEW, EDITED, REMOVED } private final Map<String, ChangeType> changedFiles = new HashMap<>(); public synchronized void recordChange(String path, ChangeType type) { if (type == ChangeType.EDITED && changedFiles.get(path) == ChangeType.NEW) { return; } changedFiles.put(path, type); } public synchronized ChangeType getChangeType(String path) { return changedFiles.get(path); } public synchronized Map<String, ChangeType> getChangedFiles() {
